title: Department Manager Vacancy at Costco India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Costco India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, Costco India in Chandigarh is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Costco India:
Costco India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Operations

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Costco India!
